creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 167335
Update to 0.8.8g

To committer:
After applying attached patch, please REMOVE the file 'files/patch-CVE-2015-8369' as it is no longer needed.
It has been incorporated in the upstream codebase.

Poudriere testport logs at:

https://poudriere2.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/0.8.8g/


Also, please merge into the quarterly branch as this update may contain additional security patches.
